heading: Decisions by the Secretary
label: 1985 Decisions by the Secretary
text: Except in the event of suit as provided in , or other appropriate court proceedings, all decisions rendered by the Secretary under the provisions of this chapter shall be final and conclusive on all questions of law or fact, and no other official of the United States shall have jurisdiction to review any such decisions.section 1984 of this title
notes: Amendments1991—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(a)section 785 of this title, substituted “1984” for “784”.Pub. L. 102–83, § 5(c)(1), (2)(E), substituted “Secretary” for “Administrator” in section catchline and in text.Pub. L. 102–83, § 4(b)(1)
